# Sports Trivia Platform
> Modern multi-player sports trivia experience built with Next.js 15, Prisma, and Supabase.

## Documentation
- [README](README.md): Project overview, platform modules, and setup instructions.
- [Product Requirements](docs/sportstrivia.md): Core platform logic, PRD, and feature roadmap.
- [API Reference](docs/API_REFERENCE.md): Exhaustive breakdown of public, player, and admin REST endpoints.

## Notes for AI Agents
- The platform uses **Next.js 15 App Router** and **Prisma ORM**.
- Authentication is handled via **NextAuth v5**.
- Administrative endpoints and internal configurations are restricted and excluded from this public index.
- For deep integration context, see [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt).
